items.title: Hamas rejects Gaza disarmament plan, Palestinian official says
items.summary: The official tells the BBC that the armed group will not move forward with talks until Israel fully complies with its commitments.

items.title: US blockade of Iran ports irresponsible and dangerous, China says
items.summary: China, the biggest buyer of Iranian oil, says the US naval blockade undermines an "already fragile ceasefire".

items.title: Retrial over death of Argentina legend Maradona to begin
items.summary: The first trial - which saw members of Maradona's medical team accused of poor care - collapsed after a judge let cameras into the court.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 教宗訪聖奧古斯丁出生地 向反戰理論神學家致敬
items.summary: 近日因反戰立場而與美國總統川普互批的教宗良十四世，今天來到曾定義戰爭正義與否的天主教神學家聖奧古斯丁位於北非阿爾及利亞的出生地，向自己的信仰根源致敬。  路透社報導，正在非洲進行為期10...…

items.title: 列車故障釀禍！泰國貓咪熱到抓狂   狠咬飼主手部
items.summary: 天氣逐漸變熱，帶毛小孩出門要三思！今（14日）泰國有隻疑似熱到抓狂的貓咪，咬傷牠的飼主，最後在3位工作人員用床單覆蓋壓制，花費超過20分鐘才成功控制貓咪，此外列車還因機械故障2次...…

items.title: 選前站台匈牙利總理奧班 范斯：感謝他在歐洲捍衛美國利益
items.summary: 執政16年的匈牙利總理奧班（Viktor Orban）在12日國會大選失利，外界視此結果為美國總統川普、俄羅斯總統普廷等人所代表的右翼、威權主義挫敗。選前替奧班站台的美副總統范...…
